mnemonics: T.R.U.S.T. (Transparent, Reliable, Unbiased, Safe, Tested by Third Parties)
keyPoints: Independent oversight ensures impartial evaluation of AI systems against established criteria.
Certification provides a recognizable seal of approval, signaling that an AI system is ethical, safe, and fair.
The process involves rigorous auditing of data, algorithms, and outputs to build public and user confidence.
commonMistakes: Assuming internal company audits are sufficient for building public trust (third-party validation is crucial).
Confusing a one-time certification with an ongoing process (systems and data can drift, requiring continuous oversight).
